CVE-2020-14983.title: The server in Chocolate Doom 3.0.0 and Crispy Doom 5.8.0 doesn't  ...
CVE-2020-14983.description: The server in Chocolate Doom 3.0.0 and Crispy Doom 5.8.0 doesn't validate the user-controlled num_players value, leading to a buffer overflow. A malicious user can overwrite the server's stack.
